title: Code with Claude Tokyo 2026: Opening Keynote
summary: Anthropic held a Code with Claude 2026 opening keynote in Tokyo featuring updates from engineering and product leaders. The event showcases the company's latest developments and strategic direction in AI.
writeup: This video presents the opening keynote from Anthropic's Code with Claude 2026 event in Tokyo, featuring updates from the company's engineering and product leaders. It serves as a venue for Anthropic to outline its latest developments and strategic direction in AI. The keynote format gathers leadership presentations to showcase where the company's products and engineering work are headed.
